objective: Implement passkey-first login with email fallback
workspace_setup: Open /workspace/myapp as a Codex Project before starting; use an isolated worktree for the implementation Worker

workers.scope: write auth UI, server handlers, and auth tests

acceptance_criteria: Passkey-first login and email fallback follow the supplied auth specification
Auth-focused tests, lint, and typecheck pass
No billing, migration, secret, or deployment files change

goals.objective: Implement passkey-first login with email fallback inside the approved auth scope
success_criteria: Passkey-first login and email fallback follow docs/auth-spec.md
Auth-focused tests, lint, and typecheck pass
Changed files stay inside src/auth/** and tests/auth/**

claim: candidate implementation only; not production-ready until final integrated review and deploy approval
automation: Create one Controller heartbeat during startup and route until terminal state
human_approval_policy: Local auth code and tests inside the declared scope are pre-authorized. Production credentials, deploy, merge, user-data migration, and real external writes require human approval.
discovery: auth issues, failing auth tests, recent auth commits
connectors: GitHub connector if exposed; otherwise local git diff and manually supplied PR links
worktree_policy: one isolated Codex worktree for the implementation Worker; Reviewer uses same-directory fork; State-Writer remains in the control-plane checkout
review: review required before PASS if any code/config/PR diff exists
